parameters.name: list_projects
parameters.description: List all Jira projects accessible with the token. No parameters. Use this first to find a project key before other operations.

parameters.name: search_issues
parameters.description: Search issues with JQL. Examples: 'assignee = currentUser() AND status != Done', 'project = KAN ORDER BY created DESC', 'text ~ \"login bug\"'. Parameters: jql (required), limit (optional default 20), fields (optional comma list).

parameters.name: get_issue
parameters.description: Get full issue detail by key (e.g. KAN-1). Returns summary, status, type, assignee, description, labels, links, recent comments. Parameters: key (required).

parameters.name: create_issue
parameters.description: Create a new issue. Parameters: project (required, key like KAN), summary (required), issuetype (optional, default Task - use list_issue_types to see valid types), description, assignee (accountId from list_users), priority (e.g. Highest, High, Medium, Low), labels (comma-separated), parent (for subtasks, parent issue key).

parameters.name: update_issue
parameters.description: Update issue fields. Parameters: key (required), plus at least one of: summary, description, assignee (accountId; pass empty string to unassign), priority, labels (comma-separated). To change status use transition_issue instead.

parameters.name: add_comment
parameters.description: Add a comment to an issue. Parameters: key (required), text (required, plain text).

parameters.name: list_comments
parameters.description: List all comments on an issue. Parameters: key (required).

parameters.name: transition_issue
parameters.description: Change issue status. Parameters: key (required), transition (required, status name like 'Done', 'In Progress' or transition id). Status names are localized per workspace - use list_transitions first if unsure.

parameters.name: list_transitions
parameters.description: List available status transitions for an issue from its current state. Parameters: key (required).

parameters.name: list_issue_types
parameters.description: List valid issue types for a project. Parameters: project (required, project key).

parameters.name: link_issues
parameters.description: Create a relationship between two issues. Parameters: from (required, issue key), to (required, issue key), type (optional, default 'Relates'; also 'Blocks', 'Duplicate', 'Cloners'). Example: from=KAN-1 to=KAN-2 type=Blocks means KAN-1 blocks KAN-2.

parameters.name: list_users
parameters.description: Search Atlassian users by name or email. Use before assignee fields to find accountId. Parameters: query (required, name/email fragment), limit (optional, default 10).
